name: Dabi and shōta
description:
FLUFFY|| “it’s like having an angry cat!”

Oh yippee! You and aizawa get to rehabilitate dabi, this is going to suck. It’s like putting two feral cats in one room, at least he’s wearing quirk eliminating cuffs.

Bro someone turn that sun off iTS TOO HOT! Guhhhh my brain is mud..
